entries.when_to_use: Use export_inspection_package when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Export a human inspection only paper snapshot for writing-style review. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use publication_aftercare_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read a refs-only publication aftercare control surface for resubmission, talk package, Overleaf sync, ARIS research-pipeline / auto-review-loop / experiment queue absorption, and reviewer refresh. It can only emit MAS owner-route task refs or typed blockers; it does not write publication_eval, controller_decisions, current_package, paper package, or submission authority.

entries.when_to_use: Use publication_aftercare_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read a refs-only publication aftercare control surface for resubmission, talk package, Overleaf sync, ARIS research-pipeline / auto-review-loop / experiment queue absorption, and reviewer refresh. It can only emit MAS owner-route task refs or typed blockers; it does not write publication_eval, controller_decisions, current_package, paper package, or submission authority.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use external_learning_adoption_closure when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read the MAS-owned closure surface for Co-Scientist, Nature-skills, ARS, AutoSci, EvoScientist/EvoSkills, ARK, ARIS, PaperSpine, and Open Auto Research learning. It distinguishes owner-surface landed work from contract-only or not-landed gaps, and declares the nonblocking external-learning sidecar execution slot.

entries.when_to_use: Use external_learning_adoption_closure when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read the MAS-owned closure surface for Co-Scientist, Nature-skills, ARS, AutoSci, EvoScientist/EvoSkills, ARK, ARIS, PaperSpine, and Open Auto Research learning. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_capability_discover when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Return the agent-facing Display Pack inventory, callable actions, expected receipt refs, and forbidden authority boundary. This is the low-friction discovery entry for MAS agents; humans manage assets, agents consume this structured capability surface.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_capability_discover when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Return the agent-facing Display Pack inventory, callable actions, expected receipt refs, and forbidden authority boundary. This is the low-friction discovery entry for MAS agents; humans manage assets, agents consume this structured capability surface.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_orchestrate when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Compile current_owner_delta, claim/data refs, paper target, natural-language intent, or a partial figure_request into a figure_intent; then rank templates, run preflight, emit quality-floor status, adaptable-template hints, typed repair routes, and the next callable. This is the ordinary low-friction path for autonomous MAS agents and does not require manual template selection.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_orchestrate when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Compile current_owner_delta, claim/data refs, paper target, natural-language intent, or a partial figure_request into a figure_intent; then rank templates, run preflight, emit quality-floor status, adaptable-template hints, typed repair routes, and the next callable. This is the ordinary low-friction path for autonomous MAS agents and does not require manual template selection.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_preflight when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Check selected template assets, QC profile, R runtime dependencies, style profile lock, and golden coverage before render. Findings route to style/profile/runtime/template repair without mutating data, statistics, evidence marks, or publication verdicts.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_preflight when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Check selected template assets, QC profile, R runtime dependencies, style profile lock, and golden coverage before render. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_render when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Materialize Display Pack figure artifacts and paper-level display refs from a prepared paper_root or frozen data payload. entries.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_export when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Export MAS-owned read-only projection, pending OPL family tasks, source refs, owner receipt contract and substrate refs for OPL generated/hosted surfaces. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_dispatch when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Consume an OPL typed queue task and return a MAS owner-route dispatch receipt, owner receipt, typed blocker, or explicit OPL opt-in executor/proof refs only; it does not authorize domain truth, publication quality, artifact gate or current package writes.

entries.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_dispatch when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Consume an OPL typed queue task and return a MAS owner-route dispatch receipt, owner receipt, typed blocker, or explicit OPL opt-in executor/proof refs only; it does not authorize domain truth, publication quality, artifact gate or current package writes.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.

entries.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.

capability_invocation_plan_contract.agent_hot_path_rule: Autonomous agents consume AgentExecutionIndex, OperationalToolCard, CapabilityInvocationPlan, and ToolResultEnvelope; raw contracts remain generation and validation inputs.
capability_invocation_plan_contract.non_authority_rule: Invocation metadata never becomes MAS study truth, publication quality, artifact authority, memory authority, or production readiness.
selection_order: diagnostic/support tool only when explicitly requested
typed_blocker candidate when no matching card exists

capability_resolver_contract.non_authority_rule: Capability resolution can rank and explain candidates, but it cannot write domain truth, owner receipts, typed blockers, publication quality, or submission readiness.

tool_cards.command: uv run python -m med_autoscience.cli product governance-report --workspace-root <workspace_root>

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.

tool_cards.summary: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use publication_aftercare_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read a refs-only publication aftercare control surface for resubmission, talk package, Overleaf sync, ARIS research-pipeline / auto-review-loop / experiment queue absorption, and reviewer refresh. It can only emit MAS owner-route task refs or typed blockers; it does not write publication_eval, controller_decisions, current_package, paper package, or submission authority.

tool_index_entries.when_to_use: Use publication_aftercare_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read a refs-only publication aftercare control surface for resubmission, talk package, Overleaf sync, ARIS research-pipeline / auto-review-loop / experiment queue absorption, and reviewer refresh. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use external_learning_adoption_closure when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read the MAS-owned closure surface for Co-Scientist, Nature-skills, ARS, AutoSci, EvoScientist/EvoSkills, ARK, ARIS, PaperSpine, and Open Auto Research learning. It distinguishes owner-surface landed work from contract-only or not-landed gaps, and declares the nonblocking external-learning sidecar execution slot.

tool_index_entries.when_to_use: Use external_learning_adoption_closure when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read the MAS-owned closure surface for Co-Scientist, Nature-skills, ARS, AutoSci, EvoScientist/EvoSkills, ARK, ARIS, PaperSpine, and Open Auto Research learning. It distinguishes owner-surface landed work from contract-only or not-landed gaps, and declares the nonblocking external-learning sidecar execution slot.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_capability_discover when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Return the agent-facing Display Pack inventory, callable actions, expected receipt refs, and forbidden authority boundary. This is the low-friction discovery entry for MAS agents; humans manage assets, agents consume this structured capability surface.

tool_index_entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_capability_discover when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Return the agent-facing Display Pack inventory, callable actions, expected receipt refs, and forbidden authority boundary. This is the low-friction discovery entry for MAS agents; humans manage assets, agents consume this structured capability surface.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

tool_index_entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_orchestrate when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Compile current_owner_delta, claim/data refs, paper target, natural-language intent, or a partial figure_request into a figure_intent; then rank templates, run preflight, emit quality-floor status, adaptable-template hints, typed repair routes, and the next callable. This is the ordinary low-friction path for autonomous MAS agents and does not require manual template selection.

tool_index_entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_orchestrate when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Compile current_owner_delta, claim/data refs, paper target, natural-language intent, or a partial figure_request into a figure_intent; then rank templates, run preflight, emit quality-floor status, adaptable-template hints, typed repair routes, and the next callable. This is the ordinary low-friction path for autonomous MAS agents and does not require manual template selection.
